content: Planner, confirmed orchestrator-role/SKILL.md and trail-schema.md are Platform-layer files affecting all 10 domains uniformly, not owned by any single domain -- within ceo's 'approval of major cross-agent actions' scope, no individual domain sign-off blocking here.
Planner, re-read fe7be6ff/disposition.json directly: confirmed checker passed, handoff_verified true, needs-approval only due to catalog/ writes. Proceeding to ratify.

Planner, edited .clinerules: header changed from 'staged, needs-approval... Not yet ratified' to 'ratified, approved via /ceo:approve-initiative (trail a67f85ba)', and the Ratification section rewritten to record the approval rather than defer to it. fe7be6ff's own sealed disposition.json left untouched (Article 3) -- the ratification record lives here, in this new trail, plus the live .clinerules edit.

Planner, this cycle's Make step touched only root .clinerules and this trail's own files -- no catalog/skills.json, no marketplace.json twin, no other domain's SKILL.md. Per hil-gating.md the write itself is TYPE2; handing to Checker to confirm before this seals accept.
